## Environment

- **Hardware:** (e.g., Apple M3 16GB, RTX 4090 24GB, CPU only)
- **Bun version:** (run `bun --version`)
- **VxLLM version:** (run `vxllm --version` or check package.json)
- **Model:** (e.g., qwen2.5:7b Q4_K_M)
